Name: Scanningway
Description: A scanner for Free Company members, providing name and location/time AFK.
Punchline: Track popular hours and time away for effective event planning.
Author: The Warrior of WHAT

Name: Hostingway
Description: For venue managers to track guests and sync information with staff, and more.
Punchline: A utility tool for venue managers.
Author: The Warrior of WHAT
Changelog:
- Added French, German, and Spanish Menu support 
 -- Spanish is for the menu ONLY. Currently does not support /random rolls in Spanish due to lack of SE support for the language. 
 - Updated Greetingway to ensure Offline Guests can be reset, as well as added a clarification method about the safety lock on 'Greet', so people can't be greeted outside of the venue lock zone.
